steps.title: Find the repeated cycle
steps.content: The claim requires a quotation showing two parts that repeat over time: anticipation when a new year arrives and regretful reflection when it ends. A strong quotation must include both hope for the future and a sorrowful look back.

steps.title: Choose the complete evidence
steps.content: Choice A shows fear, not a yearly cycle. Choice B creates an ominous pause but no regretful reflection. Choice C shows regret over wasted time but not anticipation followed by repetition. The remaining quotation says each year comes with high ambitions and departs with a sigh linked to the past. The answer is D.
